approvedBy: Steve continuous-builder priority + Codex Foundation builder session
approvalSource: Steve prioritized safe parallel extraction worker protocol after extraction output routing, with explicit instruction to avoid live extraction, private auth, paid access, external writes, Drive mutation, Gmail/ClickUp sends, Agent Feedback auto-send, and hidden subagents unless separately approved.
scopeSummary: Define visible parallel extraction worker protocol with source-packet ownership, artifact paths, permission class, quality gates, wrap reports, import flow, and stop conditions; prove duplicate ownership, private source, live launch, direct write, hidden subagent, and shared-file variants fail closed.
notApproved: Do not search YouTube or the public web or call source APIs.
Do not fetch transcripts, capture screenshots/keyframes, download videos, summarize content, run vision, or call a model.
Do not use paid/private/community/course auth, Skool, MyICOR, Loom, or authorized-browser sessions.
Do not write Research Inbox rows, KB pages, atoms, synthesis facts, action routes, vector/query indexes, or backlog content from extracted material.
Do not mutate Drive, Gmail, ClickUp, Slack, Agent Feedback, or external systems.
Do not launch hidden subagents, invisible workers, or parallel extraction workers from this card.
